name: WYNN RESORTS LTD
business: Wynn Resorts designs, develops, and operates luxury integrated resorts featuring gaming, hotel rooms, retail, dining, entertainment, and convention facilities. It operates resorts in Macau, Las Vegas, and Boston, and has a 40% equity interest in a resort under construction in the United Arab Emirates.

exposures.sentence: Wynn Resorts, Limited is a preeminent designer, developer, and operator of integrated resorts featuring luxury hotel rooms, high-end retail space, an array of dining and entertainment options, meeting and convention facilities, and gaming.

These activities are led by our in-house design, development, and construction subsidiary and its senior management team, which has significant experience across all major design and construction disciplines.

Our investments in low-carbon energy, including on-site solar arrays and notably, a 1,000-acre solar facility in Lincoln County, Nevada, drive our progress toward our goal of reaching net-zero carbon emissions by 2050.
System failure, information leakage and the cost of maintaining sufficient cybersecurity could adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: Wynn Al Marjan Island resort opening
catalysts.sentence: Wynn Al Marjan Island, which is currently under construction, is anticipated to be completed and open to the public in 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Macau annual gaming revenues were $30.9 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Macau Statistical Information, annual gaming revenues have increased to $30.9 billion, $28.4 billion, and $22.7 billion in 2025, 2024, and 2023, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: Las Vegas Strip total gaming win was $8.8 billion in both 2024 and 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to statistics published by the Nevada Gaming Control Board, Las Vegas Strip total gaming win was $8.8 billion in both 2024 and 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Greater Boston metropolitan area has approximately 5 million residents.
tamClaims.sentence: The greater Boston metropolitan area is the largest population center in New England, with a population of approximately 5 million residents.
